race.comment: WEEKEND SCOTCH (2) was an impressive winner last time in quickest of the meeting when scoring by 3.5 lengths (17.24) at this track. Form reads well for this. FIRE MOTTO (4) is better than last start when sixth (17.91) from Box 6 at this track over 300m. Better than the latest run and deserves another chance. BALLYNEALE BULL (1) scored two back then well held latest finishing a 4 length 7th at The Gardens (16.20). The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Can figure in the finish. SHE'S SILKY (7) cannot be written off despite a miss here at her latest outing.

runners.name: Fire Motto
runners.owners: Sam And Jason Motto - Mgr S Flanagan
